login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.subtitleInvite: Sign in and we'll take you to the invitation.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with CRM Template for WhatsApp
signup.subtitleInvite: Verify your email, then accept the invitation to join your team.
signup.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
signup.inviteOnlyBody: Accounts are created by invitation only. Ask an administrator of your store to invite you, then open the link they send.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: We've sent a password reset link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Please check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been set. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.invalidLinkBody: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one.

nav.unreadConversations: {count, plural, one {# unread conversation} other {# unread conversations}}
nav.unreadNotifications: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Everything in one place — your account and your store. Pick a section to manage it.

security.title: Login & security
security.description: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.

fields.title: Fields & tags
fields.description: Two ways to organize contacts: colour-coded tags for quick grouping, and custom fields for structured data.
